english_text:
Worship
WORSHIP — Specific Religious Obligations at specific time intervals
OBEDIENCE — All the time
alt_text: Teaching diagram about worship. A central green box reads 'عبادۃ / Worship', pointing upward with a red arrow to '(الله) معبود' (Allah, the Worshiped). Below, two callouts branch from worship: 'WORSHIP — Specific Religious Obligations at specific time intervals' and 'OBEDIENCE — All the time'.
notes: Pedagogical diagram distinguishing 'ibada (worship rituals at fixed times) from broader obedience (continuous).
